basic_details.job_title: NIELIT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Engineer, Project Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) has officially announced the Project Engineer and Project Associate Recruitment 2026 with 5 vacancies. The detailed notification was published on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of not exceeding 45 years and hold qualifications including B.E./B.Tech, MCA/M.Sc, or M.E./M.Tech in relevant fields with required knowledge and experience are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their online applications up to 31 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply on

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B. Tech, MCA/M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech in relevant fields with specific knowledge and experience.
qualification.details: Project Engineer (IT): B.E./B. Tech (CSE/IT/ECE)/MCA/M.Sc. (CS/IT)/ DOEACC ‘B' Level or equivalent. Project Associate: B.E/ B. Tech. (Computer Science/Computer Engg/ Information Technology/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering/ Electronics and Instrumentation/ Electronics/Electronics & Communication), M.Sc (Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Electronics/ Applied Electronics/ Physics) or equivalent with First class from recognized university/institution. Project Engineer (DevOps): B.E/B.Tech/ M.E/M.Tech in Electronics & Communication/ Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology or DOEACC B-level or MCA/M.Sc in Computer Science with Good knowledge of Linux Server Administration, Expertise in various Development, Testing, Automation tools in container. Project Engineer (Information Security): B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech in Electronics & Communication/ Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology or DOEACC B-level or MCA/ M.Sc in Computer Science with Good knowledge of Linux Server Administration and Cyber Security Fundamentals.

selection_process: Online Interview/Test Verification of essential qualifications and experience
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIELIT Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIELIT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_electronics_and_in: B.E./B. Tech, MCA/M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech in relevant fields with specific knowledge and experience.

content_sections.heading: NIELIT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIELIT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIELIT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIELIT Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Engineer (IT): B.E./B. Tech (CSE/IT/ECE)/MCA/M.Sc. (CS/IT)/ DOEACC ‘B' Level or equivalent. Project Associate: B.E/ B. Tech. (Computer Science/Computer Engg/ Information Technology/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering/ Electronics and Instrumentation/ Electronics/Electronics & Communication), M.Sc (Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Electronics/ Applied Electronics/ Physics) or equivalent with First class from recognized university/institution. Project Engineer (DevOps): B.E/B.Tech/ M.E/M.Tech in Electronics & Communication/ Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology or DOEACC B-level or MCA/M.Sc in Computer Science with Good knowledge of Linux Server Administration, Expertise in various Development, Testing, Automation tools in container. Project Engineer (Information Security): B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech in Electronics & Communication/ Computer Science and Engineering/ Information Technology or DOEACC B-level or MCA/ M.Sc in Computer Science with Good knowledge of Linux Server Administration and Cyber Security Fundamentals.

content_sections.heading: NIELIT Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years. Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: NIELIT Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online Interview/Test Verification of essential qualifications and experience

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIELIT Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIELIT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIELIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NIELIT Project Engineer and Project Associate positions is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification varies for each Project Engineer post. Generally, it includes B.E./B. Tech, MCA/M.Sc, or M.E/M.Tech in relevant fields, along with specific knowledge and experience as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the NIELIT recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the advertised posts is not exceeding 45 years. Specific age relaxation benefits may be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for NIELIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 200/-. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid online as part of the application process.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the NIELIT posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview/Test. Following this, there will be a verification of essential qualifications and experience to confirm the candidate's suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of the job at NIELIT?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contractual positions. The job type is contract, meaning the employment will be for a fixed tenure, typically one year as mentioned in the brief.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for NIELIT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided below. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary range for the Project Engineer and Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated emoluments range from Rs. 23,000/- to Rs. 35,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee waiver for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data states that the application fee of Rs. 200/- is for "All Categories." It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific exemptions or relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the NIELIT recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
